title: callicarpa longissima
intro: Callicarpa longissima, also known as the long purple berry vine, is a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Callicarpa longissima include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Callicarpa longissima are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
